flow_description: CodER patch task: a single-task flow where CodER implements a code fix, producing a completion packet with deliverables, diagnostics, and rollback instructions.

flow_steps.note: Operator requests a bug fix in the validate_packet.py tool — it currently doesn't check ISO 8601 timestamp format.

packet.instruction: Fix the ISO 8601 timestamp validation in orchestration/tools/validate_packet.py. Currently the validator checks that a timestamp field exists but does not verify it is valid ISO 8601 format. Add a regex or datetime parse check. Ensure the change is reversible and add a test case.

input_context.current_behavior: Timestamp field checked for existence only, not format validity
input_context.desired_behavior: Timestamp field must be valid ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ or with timezone offset)

constraints: Add test case for valid and invalid timestamps.
Do not modify other validation levels without explicit instruction.
No production deployment — local testing only.

transitions.note: Task created by OverCR operator request

packet.summary: Fixed ISO 8601 timestamp validation in validate_packet.py. Added regex-based format check and datetime parse fallback. Added 4 test cases (2 valid, 2 invalid timestamps). All tests passing.

deliverables.description: Added validate_iso8601() function that checks timestamp format via regex (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS with optional timezone) and falls back to datetime.fromisoformat() parse. Integrated into Level 1 structural validation.
Test suite for validate_packet.py including 4 timestamp validation cases: valid ISO 8601 with Z suffix, valid with offset, invalid date format, and empty string.

packet.next_steps_recommendation: Change is reversible and tests pass. Ready to merge. No further subagent routing needed.

audit_trail.rollback_instructions: Revert validate_packet.py to pre-task version (git checkout orchestration/tools/validate_packet.py) and delete test_validate_packet.py.

decision.reason: Code change is reversible, tests pass, no breaking changes. Present to operator for review and optional merge.

packet.summary: Fixed ISO 8601 timestamp validation in validate_packet.py. Added regex + datetime parse check and 4 test cases. All tests passing.
key_findings: Regex check for YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format with optional timezone
Falls back to datetime.fromisoformat() for strict parsing
4 test cases added: 2 valid, 2 invalid timestamps
risk_flags: None — change is reversible and non-breaking
next_steps: Review the code change if desired
Run full validation suite on example packets to confirm no regressions
packet.routing_suggestion: No further subagent routing needed. Operator can merge directly.
